title: best herbal teas for acne
description: Melissa officinalis tea contains bioactive constituents such as limonene, linalool, and rosmarinic acid, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties that help to treat the acne ailment. The anti-inflammatory properties of this tea help to reduce redness and swelling associated with acne, while its antimicrobial properties inhibit the growth of bacteria that can cause acne.
